name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Dish
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends a Dish Network infrared remote code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The number of the receiver to target, between 1 and 16 inclusive. Defaults to `1`.

config_entries.label: Command
config_entries.description: The command to send, between 0 and 63 inclusive.
